name: @ttt-productions/chat-schemas
description: Pure Zod schemas for chat message wire shapes: ChatAttachmentSchema, ReplyToSchema. Tier 0 — consumed by both chat-core (UI) and ttt-core (callable composition) without forcing the chat UI dep graph on backend / schema callers.

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build

author: DJ (TTT Productions)
